raw_consumer_statement: Formal Complaint Regarding Unresolved Dispute with American Express To the financial regulator, I am writing to request formal assistance in resolving a dispute with American Express. Despite receiving confirmation from the merchant, XXXX XXXX XXXX, on XX/XX/XXXX that a chargeback of {$650.00} was approved and processed on XX/XX/XXXX, American Express has failed to credit my account and continues to demand payment. I have contacted American Express multiple times regarding this credit, but the issue remains unresolved as of XX/XX/XXXX.
